disclaimer.text: This platform provides legal information, not legal advice. For complex matters, consult a qualified lawyer. Content is sourced from official Indian law databases.

about.title: About NyayaSaathi
about.mission: NyayaSaathi exists to bridge the justice gap for India's first-generation litigants — citizens who face legal problems but have never engaged with the legal system. We provide plain-language rights information, AI-powered explanations, and free document templates.
about.ai_text: Every AI-generated explanation is shown alongside the original law text from IndiaCode. We use dual-display to ensure transparency — you always see both the simplified version and the source law.
about.team_text: This platform was built as a hackathon project to demonstrate responsible, accessible, bilingual AI for legal aid in India.

translate.page_sub: Paste any complex legal notice, FIR, or agreement to get a simple, 12th-grade level translation.
translate.error: Failed to translate document. Please try again.

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
